title: Blast Furnace
point: BF is a counter-current heat and mass exchanger.

title: Counter Current Flow
point: Gas ascends while burden and coke descend.

title: Heat Transfer
point: Heat transfers from gas to burden.

title: Oxygen Transfer
point: Oxygen transfers from burden to gas.

title: BF Efficiency
point: Counter-current reactions make BF highly efficient.

title: Coke Development
point: Large BF growth became possible with high-strength coke.

title: Raw Materials
point: Iron ore and coke are major BF raw materials.

title: BF Raw Materials
point: Iron ore is a primary iron-bearing material.

title: BF Raw Materials
point: Manganese ore is a BF additive.

title: BF Raw Materials
point: Coke is fuel and reducing agent.

title: BF Raw Materials
point: Scrap can be charged in BF.

title: BF Raw Materials
point: Coal dust acts as auxiliary fuel.

title: Iron Ore Form
point: Hematite is the most used iron ore in SAIL plants.

title: Iron Ore Grade
point: BF iron ore typically contains 62–66% Fe.

title: Gangue
point: High alumina and silica are common gangue materials.

title: Viscous Slag
point: High slag viscosity causes unstable furnace operation.

title: Limestone
point: Limestone acts as flux in BF.

title: Slag Formation
point: Limestone combines with acidic impurities to form slag.

title: LD Slag Benefit
point: LD slag utilization reduces production cost.

title: Waste Utilization
point: LD slag usage promotes waste utilization.

title: Slag Basicity
point: Quartzite helps maintain optimum slag basicity.

title: Manganese Ore
point: Manganese ore supplies Mn to hot metal.

title: Mn Ore Quality
point: High alkali Mn ore should be used judiciously.

title: Coke
point: Coke acts as reducing agent and fuel.

title: Coal Quality
point: Indian coal shows wide ash fluctuations.

title: Poor Coke Strength
point: Poor coke strength generates excess fines.

title: Coke Improvement
point: Imported coal is blended with indigenous coal.

title: Sinter
point: Sinter is an agglomerated iron-bearing material.

title: Sinter Use
point: Sinter utilizes plant and mine fines.

title: Sintering
point: Sintering is agglomeration by incipient fusion.

title: Sinter Product
point: Sinter is a porous lumpy mass.

title: Scrap
point: Scrap is generated during steel production.

title: Scrap Recycling
point: Scrap is recycled through BF charging.

title: Pellet Feed
point: Micro-fines unsuitable for sinter are pelletized.

title: CDI
point: Coal dust injection is auxiliary fuel injection.

title: CDI Location
point: Coal dust is injected through tuyeres.

title: Iron Ore Fe Spec
point: Iron ore lumps require minimum 61% Fe.

title: Iron Ore Size
point: Iron ore lump size is 10–40 mm.

title: Coke VM
point: Coke volatile matter should be below 1%.

title: Mn Ore SiO₂
point: Mn ore SiO₂ should not exceed 30%.

title: Mn Ore Al₂O₃
point: Mn ore Al₂O₃ should not exceed 5%.

title: Mn Ore P
point: Mn ore phosphorus should not exceed 0.30%.

title: High Lines
point: High lines receive and transport BF raw materials.

title: RMHP
point: Raw materials are unloaded at RMHP.

title: Ore Yard
point: Ore yard is used for stocking and averaging.

title: Material Handling
point: Wagon tipplers transport BF raw materials.

title: Material Handling
point: Conveyors are used for BF material transport.

title: Material Handling
point: Stackers are used in ore yard handling.

title: Sinter Handling
point: Sinter is screened in stock house.

title: Sinter Fines
point: Sinter fines are returned through conveyors.

title: Coke Supply
point: Coke comes from Coke Sorting Plant.

title: Coke Screening
point: Undersize coke is returned through conveyors.

title: Stock House
point: Stock house contains raw material bunkers.

title: Vibro Feeder
point: Vibro feeder feeds material to conveyor.

title: Charging Route
point: Bunker → Vibro feeder → Conveyor → Hopper → Skip.

title: Hoist House
point: Hoist house lifts burden to furnace top.

title: Skip Hoist
point: Two-way skip hoist uses two skips.

title: Weighing Systems
point: Load cells can be used for weighing.

title: Burden Distribution
point: Alternate coke and ore layers are formed.

title: Blast Furnace Structure
point: BF consists of two truncated cones base-to-base.

title: BF Sections
point: Belly is the bosh parallel region.

title: BF Sections
point: Hearth collects hot metal and slag.

title: Throat
point: Top burden surface is located at throat.

title: Belly
point: Softening and melting begin in belly.

title: Hearth
point: Hearth stores molten metal and slag.

title: Refractory
point: BF is lined with refractory materials.

title: Charging Systems
point: BF uses double bell or bell-less top charging.

title: Tap Hole
point: Hearth contains tap hole for hot metal tapping.

title: Indirect Reduction
point: Indirect reduction occurs below 900°C with CO/H₂.

title: Direct Reduction
point: Direct reduction occurs above 900°C using carbon.

title: Modern BF
point: Modern furnaces may have 2–4 tap holes.

title: BF Products
point: Hot metal is a major BF product.

title: BF Products
point: Slag is a major BF product.

title: BF Products
point: BF gas is a major BF product.

title: BF Gas Use
point: Cleaned BF gas is used for stove heating.

title: BF Gas Use
point: BF gas is used in coke ovens.

title: BF Gas Use
point: BF gas is used in rolling mill reheating furnaces.

title: Tapping
point: Tap hole is opened using drill and oxygen lancing.

title: Slag Separation
point: Skimmer plate separates slag from metal.

title: Charging Systems
point: Double bell is a charging system.

title: Charging Systems
point: Paul-Wurth BLT is a charging system.

title: BLT
point: Bells are replaced by bins and valves.

title: Charging Sequence
point: CCOO is common in bell-less top furnaces.

title: SCADA
point: SCADA means Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition.

title: Auxiliary Sections
point: CHSGP = Cast House Slag Granulation Plant.

title: PCM
point: PCM is a double strand pig casting machine.

title: PCM
point: Lime coating prevents pig sticking to moulds.

title: Cold Pig Yard
point: Cold pigs are stacked by quality.

title: Clay Mass Shop
point: Produces mud gun clay and runner mass.

title: Granulated Slag
point: Granulated slag is sold to cement industries.

title: Auxiliary Fuel Injection
point: Used to lower BF operating cost.

title: Auxiliary Fuels
point: Coal dust can be injected fuel.

title: Auxiliary Fuels
point: Natural gas can be auxiliary fuel.

title: Auxiliary Fuels
point: Coal tar can be auxiliary fuel.

title: CDI Benefit
point: CDI reduces expensive coking coal consumption.

title: Gas Cleaning
point: BF gas passes through dust catcher.

title: Gas Cleaning
point: Gas then passes through venturi washer.
